title: Spear-phishing email with macro-laden attachment delivered to eve@aisoc.dev
description: Inbound email from 192.168.1.100 delivered an Office document with a malicious VBA macro to eve@aisoc.dev. Attachment opened on WIN-DC-PRIMARY; macro spawned cmd.exe and downloaded a stage-2 payload from a known LockBit 3.0 infrastructure.

title: Exploitation of public-facing web app on WIN-DEVOPS-LT
description: WAF logs show SQL-injection and SSRF probes from 91.134.231.15 against the application on WIN-DEVOPS-LT. One request returned 200 with internal cloud-metadata content. Likely exploitation of CVE-2024-1234.

title: Watering-hole exploit served from internal Confluence by 192.168.1.100
description: Internal Confluence page injected with malicious JavaScript by 192.168.1.100. Drive-by exploit triggered browser exploitation on multiple visitors including alice@aisoc.dev. Linked to MosaicRegressor TTPs.

title: Supply-chain compromise: malicious npm package on GCP-GKE-NODE-04
description: CI pipeline on GCP-GKE-NODE-04 installed compromised npm package `event-stream`. Post-install hook executed reverse shell to 203.0.113.45. Build artefacts may be tainted.

title: Malicious USB autorun on air-gapped host AZURE-VM-FIN-001
description: USB device inserted on air-gapped AZURE-VM-FIN-001 by ops-lead@aisoc.dev. AutoRun executed Python stager that collected local files. Data staged in C:\Temp\.

title: OAuth consent phishing targeting alice@aisoc.dev
description: Malicious OAuth application granted Mail.Read and Files.Read.All scopes by alice@aisoc.dev. Inbox forwarding rule created sending mail to 185.220.101.7.

title: Obfuscated PowerShell dropper executed on WIN-HR-DESKTOP
description: PowerShell dropper executed on WIN-HR-DESKTOP by carol@aisoc.dev; payload base64-encoded and decoded in-memory. Linked to ALPHV/BlackCat ransomware staging.

title: Living-off-the-land: certutil download cradle on GCP-GKE-NODE-04
description: certutil.exe -urlcache invoked from cmd.exe on GCP-GKE-NODE-04. cmd.exe was spawned by outlook.exe. Payload downloaded from 203.0.113.45.

title: Container runtime abuse: malicious `docker run` on LIN-BUILD-CI03
description: Unauthenticated Docker API on LIN-BUILD-CI03 exploited from 45.142.122.111. Container with cryptominer spawned. CPU on host saturated to 95%.

title: Malicious WMI subscription on MAC-CFO-LAPTOP
description: Permanent WMI event subscription created on MAC-CFO-LAPTOP by admin@aisoc.dev. Consumer runs encoded script. Persistence + execution mechanism.

title: Registry Run key persistence created by eve@aisoc.dev on WIN-DC-SECONDARY
description: New value written to HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run on WIN-DC-SECONDARY. Points to roaming binary signed with revoked cert. Linked to Emotet epoch 5.

title: Scheduled task persistence on WIN-DEVOPS-LT
description: Hidden scheduled task created on WIN-DEVOPS-LT by dave@aisoc.dev: triggers every 30 minutes, runs script from %APPDATA%\Roaming. Persistence mechanism.

title: Firmware implant detected on UEFI partition of GCP-GKE-NODE-04
description: UEFI secure-boot violation on GCP-GKE-NODE-04. Unknown module detected in firmware. Signature matches MosaicRegressor implant.

title: Backdoor cron job installed on WIN-DEVOPS-LT
description: /etc/cron.d entry created by carol@aisoc.dev on WIN-DEVOPS-LT. Reverse shell beacon to 10.0.99.42 every 5 minutes.

title: UAC bypass observed on GCP-GKE-NODE-04
description: fodhelper.exe abuse on GCP-GKE-NODE-04 by ops-lead@aisoc.dev; auto-elevation triggered without prompt. Process tree shows escalation to SYSTEM.

title: Container escape via privileged pod on MAC-LEGAL-LAPTOP
description: Kubernetes privileged pod created on MAC-LEGAL-LAPTOP by alice@aisoc.dev. cgroup escape to host namespace observed. Node filesystem accessed.

title: Linux SUID binary abuse on LIN-DB-REPLICA
description: Custom SUID binary discovered in /tmp on LIN-DB-REPLICA; allows arbitrary command execution as root. Likely escalation by bob@aisoc.dev.

title: Memory-only fileless implant in svchost on WIN-HR-DESKTOP
description: Process hollowing detected on WIN-HR-DESKTOP: svchost.exe replaced with Cobalt Strike beacon to 203.0.113.45. No disk artefacts. Linked to Lazarus.

title: Indicator removal: Windows event log cleared on WIN-PROD-WEB02
description: Security event log cleared on WIN-PROD-WEB02 by ops-lead@aisoc.dev. wevtutil.exe cl Security observed in command-line telemetry.

title: Disable security tooling on WIN-PROD-WEB02
description: carol@aisoc.dev attempted to stop Defender, CrowdStrike, and Sysmon on WIN-PROD-WEB02. Tampering telemetry triggered alert.

title: LSASS memory dump on WIN-DC-PRIMARY by dave@aisoc.dev
description: comsvcs.dll MiniDump observed on WIN-DC-PRIMARY. lsass.exe memory dumped to C:\Windows\Temp\. Mimikatz signatures detected.

title: Brute-force credential spray against eve@aisoc.dev from 45.142.122.111
description: Credential spray from 45.142.122.111 against eve@aisoc.dev. 1500 password attempts in 30 minutes. One success followed by anomalous Azure AD sign-in.

title: Kerberoasting from WIN-FIN-DB01
description: Service account TGS tickets requested en-masse from WIN-FIN-DB01 by ops-lead@aisoc.dev. AES256 → RC4 downgrade observed. Mimikatz tooling indicators.

title: Active Directory DCSync from non-DC host K8S-PROD-CLUSTER
description: Replication rights abused from K8S-PROD-CLUSTER by ops-lead@aisoc.dev. All domain NTLM hashes replicated. Severe credential exposure.

title: SAML golden-ticket: forged assertion targeting svc-deploy@aisoc.dev
description: Forged SAML assertion detected for svc-deploy@aisoc.dev. Attacker pivoted to Azure AD; account enumeration followed from 91.134.231.15.

title: Domain enumeration from LIN-BUILD-CI03
description: ldap discovery from LIN-BUILD-CI03 by carol@aisoc.dev: BloodHound-style queries enumerating users, groups, ACLs.

title: Network share enumeration on AWS-EC2-PROD-API
description: Mass SMB share enumeration from AWS-EC2-PROD-API by svc-deploy@aisoc.dev; net.exe and PowerShell Get-SmbShare invocations across /24 subnet.

title: Pass-the-hash from WIN-DC-PRIMARY to K8S-PROD-CLUSTER
description: Pass-the-hash lateral movement from WIN-DC-PRIMARY to K8S-PROD-CLUSTER by alice@aisoc.dev. Golden ticket indicators present. Linked to APT29.

title: RDP lateral movement from K8S-PROD-CLUSTER
description: Anomalous RDP session from K8S-PROD-CLUSTER (dave@aisoc.dev) to GCP-GKE-NODE-04 outside business hours. Source admin not normal for GCP-GKE-NODE-04.

title: WMI lateral execution from AWS-EC2-PROD-API to WIN-DC-PRIMARY
description: wmic.exe /node:WIN-DC-PRIMARY process call create observed from AWS-EC2-PROD-API by eve@aisoc.dev. Remote command execution; payload from 198.51.100.23.

title: Bulk PII download by svc-deploy@aisoc.dev
description: svc-deploy@aisoc.dev downloaded >10 GB of customer records from production database from AZURE-VM-FIN-001. Outside normal access pattern.

title: Clipboard logging implant on WIN-DC-PRIMARY
description: Clipboard contents from WIN-DC-PRIMARY (carol@aisoc.dev) being captured to %APPDATA%\Local\. Captures span 2 hours and include credentials and crypto addresses.

title: DNS tunnelling exfiltration from LIN-DB-REPLICA
description: DNS query volume from LIN-DB-REPLICA 50× baseline. TXT records contain base64-encoded payloads. Estimated exfil ~200 MB; destination 198.51.100.23.

title: Cloud storage exfil: data egress to attacker-controlled S3 from LIN-OBS-LOGGER
description: Egress from LIN-OBS-LOGGER to s3://atk-stage-192.168.1.100/dump/ by carol@aisoc.dev. 8 GB transferred over 20 minutes. CloudTrail PutObject events match.

title: Personal Drive exfil by grace@aisoc.dev
description: grace@aisoc.dev on LIN-K8S-NODE01 uploaded 4 GB to personal Google Drive. Files include source code and customer PII.

title: DGA-based C2 traffic from AZURE-VM-FIN-001
description: DGA traffic from AZURE-VM-FIN-001 observed; 200+ NXDomain replies/min, IoCs match APT29 epoch 5. Beacons to 45.142.122.111.

title: HTTPS C2 beacon from GCP-GKE-NODE-04 to 10.0.99.42
description: Periodic HTTPS beacon from GCP-GKE-NODE-04 to 10.0.99.42 every 60 seconds with low jitter. JA3 fingerprint matches Cobalt Strike.

title: Ransomware encryption in progress on WIN-DC-SECONDARY
description: Mass file rename observed on WIN-DC-SECONDARY (svc-deploy@aisoc.dev); ..enc extension applied to ~20 k files. Ransomware note R3ADM3-Lazarus.txt found.

title: Cryptominer execution on WIN-PROD-WEB02
description: XMRig miner spawned on WIN-PROD-WEB02; CPU saturated to 95%. Mining pool 10.0.99.42:5555. Linked to Emotet epoch 5.

title: BEC: payment redirect by svc-backup@aisoc.dev
description: Spear-phishing email spoofed CFO. Wire transfer of $250 k initiated by svc-backup@aisoc.dev from WIN-DC-SECONDARY to threat-actor account. Linked to MagicWeb.

title: Public S3 bucket exposing PII
description: S3 bucket world-readable; ~40k employee records accessible. CloudTrail shows external enumeration from 185.220.101.7.

title: Identity provider compromise — anomalous Azure AD sign-in for cfo@aisoc.dev
description: Successful Azure AD sign-in for cfo@aisoc.dev from 91.134.231.15 (impossible-travel from prior location). MFA satisfied via stolen session token.

title: DDoS volumetric flood targeting public-facing LIN-K8S-NODE01
description: L4 SYN flood from a botnet (>1M PPS) targeting LIN-K8S-NODE01. Edge mitigation engaged but service degraded for 12 minutes.

title: Insider preparing departure: large mailbox export by ops-lead@aisoc.dev
description: ops-lead@aisoc.dev exported full mailbox PST (8 GB) from WIN-DC-PRIMARY. HR flag: notice given last week.

title: Malicious Office add-in installed for grace@aisoc.dev
description: Office VSTO add-in registered under HKCU for grace@aisoc.dev on GCP-GKE-NODE-04; loads on every Outlook startup; beacons to 192.168.1.100.

title: GitHub PAT leaked and abused from 198.51.100.23
description: Personal access token belonging to alice@aisoc.dev used from 198.51.100.23 to clone 14 private repos. Token committed in public dotfiles repo 6 hours earlier.

title: EC2 instance metadata service abused on WIN-DC-SECONDARY
description: IMDSv1 abused on WIN-DC-SECONDARY; temporary IAM credentials for role exfilled to 45.142.122.111. CloudTrail shows AssumeRole from external.

title: Vendor admin password reset abuse for heidi@aisoc.dev
description: Password reset for heidi@aisoc.dev performed by helpdesk in response to social-engineering call from 203.0.113.45. Token claimed within 90 seconds.

title: Pass-the-hash from WIN-FIN-DB01 to WIN-DC-PRIMARY

title: RDP lateral movement from WIN-EXCHANGE-01

title: WMI lateral execution from WIN-PROD-WEB02 to MAC-LEGAL-LAPTOP

description: grace@aisoc.dev downloaded >10 GB of customer records from production database from LIN-BUILD-CI03. Outside normal access pattern.

title: Clipboard logging implant on WIN-DC-PRIMARY
description: Clipboard contents from WIN-DC-PRIMARY (heidi@aisoc.dev) being captured to %APPDATA%\Local\. Captures span 2 hours and include credentials and crypto addresses.

title: DNS tunnelling exfiltration from MAC-CFO-LAPTOP
description: DNS query volume from MAC-CFO-LAPTOP 50× baseline. TXT records contain base64-encoded payloads. Estimated exfil ~200 MB; destination 91.134.231.15.

title: Cloud storage exfil: data egress to attacker-controlled S3 from AZURE-VM-FIN-001
description: Egress from AZURE-VM-FIN-001 to s3://atk-stage-45.142.122.111/dump/ by ceo@aisoc.dev. 8 GB transferred over 20 minutes. CloudTrail PutObject events match.

title: Personal Drive exfil by carol@aisoc.dev
description: carol@aisoc.dev on WIN-DC-PRIMARY uploaded 4 GB to personal Google Drive. Files include source code and customer PII.

title: DGA-based C2 traffic from LIN-EDGE-VPN02
description: DGA traffic from LIN-EDGE-VPN02 observed; 200+ NXDomain replies/min, IoCs match LockBit 3.0 epoch 5. Beacons to 203.0.113.45.

title: HTTPS C2 beacon from MAC-LEGAL-LAPTOP to 192.168.1.100
description: Periodic HTTPS beacon from MAC-LEGAL-LAPTOP to 192.168.1.100 every 60 seconds with low jitter. JA3 fingerprint matches Cobalt Strike.

title: Ransomware encryption in progress on WIN-DC-PRIMARY
description: Mass file rename observed on WIN-DC-PRIMARY (ceo@aisoc.dev); ..tooktdata extension applied to ~20 k files. Ransomware note R3ADM3-Lazarus.txt found.

title: Cryptominer execution on WIN-DC-PRIMARY
description: XMRig miner spawned on WIN-DC-PRIMARY; CPU saturated to 95%. Mining pool 45.142.122.111:5555. Linked to APT29.

title: BEC: payment redirect by frank@aisoc.dev
description: Spear-phishing email spoofed CFO. Wire transfer of $250 k initiated by frank@aisoc.dev from WIN-DC-PRIMARY to threat-actor account. Linked to MosaicRegressor.

title: Public S3 bucket exposing PII
description: S3 bucket world-readable; ~40k employee records accessible. CloudTrail shows external enumeration from 203.0.113.45.

title: Identity provider compromise — anomalous Azure AD sign-in for grace@aisoc.dev
description: Successful Azure AD sign-in for grace@aisoc.dev from 10.0.99.42 (impossible-travel from prior location). MFA satisfied via stolen session token.

title: DDoS volumetric flood targeting public-facing AWS-EC2-PROD-API
description: L4 SYN flood from a botnet (>1M PPS) targeting AWS-EC2-PROD-API. Edge mitigation engaged but service degraded for 12 minutes.

title: Insider preparing departure: large mailbox export by ceo@aisoc.dev
description: ceo@aisoc.dev exported full mailbox PST (8 GB) from LIN-EDGE-VPN02. HR flag: notice given last week.

title: Malicious Office add-in installed for dave@aisoc.dev
description: Office VSTO add-in registered under HKCU for dave@aisoc.dev on MAC-LEGAL-LAPTOP; loads on every Outlook startup; beacons to 185.220.101.7.

title: GitHub PAT leaked and abused from 185.220.101.7
description: Personal access token belonging to ops-lead@aisoc.dev used from 185.220.101.7 to clone 14 private repos. Token committed in public dotfiles repo 6 hours earlier.

title: EC2 instance metadata service abused on WIN-DC-SECONDARY
description: IMDSv1 abused on WIN-DC-SECONDARY; temporary IAM credentials for role exfilled to 185.220.101.7. CloudTrail shows AssumeRole from external.

title: Vendor admin password reset abuse for heidi@aisoc.dev

title: OAuth refresh-token theft for cfo@aisoc.dev
description: Refresh token for cfo@aisoc.dev replayed from 192.168.1.100. Granted access to mailbox + OneDrive without re-prompt.

title: Container image with embedded backdoor pulled by WIN-FILE-SHARE
description: Image registry/repo:malicious-backdoor pulled by WIN-FILE-SHARE. Layer scan flagged embedded netcat reverse-shell binary.

title: Outlook rule auto-forwarding mail from bob@aisoc.dev

title: Suspicious VPN login from new geography for ops-lead@aisoc.dev

title: Privileged command run as service account on WIN-HR-DESKTOP

title: Exploitation of public-facing web app on WIN-DEVOPS-LT
